name: Slow backend (metric expectation without source)

injection.description: Degrade one backend so its TTFT rises well above baseline.

expected_gateway_semantics: Pressure-aware routing shifts new requests away from the slow backend; deadline hits fail typed (upstream_timeout).
expected_client_visible_behavior: Transient latency elevation, then recovery; typed upstream_timeout envelopes for deadline hits.
abort_condition: Abort if aggregate goodput drops more than 20% below baseline for 120s.
